title: How Sweet It Is!

plot: Photographer Grif, wife Jenny, and son Davey travel to Paris. Jenny inadvertently rents a French lawyer's home. Grif and Jenny face romantic temptations while navigating the awkward living situation, testing their commitment to ea...
